phrases: online e-payment 在线电子支付；use e-payment 使用电子支付
example_sentence: We can use e-payment to buy things easily.
example_translation: 我们可以用电子支付轻松购物。

phrases: bring about changes 带来变化
example_sentence: The new policy brought about great changes in our life.
example_translation: 新政策给我们的生活带来了巨大变化。
usage_notes: 及物动词短语，后接名词/代词，主语多为事物。

phrases: rough road 崎岖的道路；rough skin 粗糙的皮肤
example_sentence: We walked along a rough path in the mountains.
example_translation: 我们沿着山里崎岖的小路行走。
usage_notes: 形容词，修饰名词，可作表语/定语。

phrases: audio book 有声书；audio equipment 音频设备
example_sentence: We can listen to audio books on the phone.
example_translation: 我们可以在手机上听有声书。
usage_notes: 形容词，修饰与声音相关的事物。

example_sentence: He is a junior student in Grade 7.
example_translation: 他是七年级的低年级学生。
usage_notes: 形容词，可修饰学生、年级、学校等。

phrases: live in a flat 住在公寓里
example_sentence: They have a new flat in the city.
example_translation: 他们在城里有一套新公寓。
usage_notes: 可数名词（英式），美式常用 apartment。

example_sentence: We should consider every aspect of the problem.
example_translation: 我们应该考虑问题的各个方面。
usage_notes: 可数名词，常用搭配：in all aspects 在各方面。

meaning: n. 蒙巴萨（肯尼亚城市）
example_sentence: Mombasa is a beautiful port city in Kenya.
example_translation: 蒙巴萨是肯尼亚一座美丽的港口城市。
usage_notes: 专有名词，首字母必须大写。

phrases: have a discussion 进行讨论
example_sentence: We had a discussion about the environment.
example_translation: 我们进行了一场关于环境的讨论。
usage_notes: 不可数/可数名词，固定搭配：have a discussion about sth.

phrases: a medical miracle 医学奇迹
example_sentence: The project is a great miracle.
example_translation: 这个项目是一个伟大的奇迹。

phrases: wash off dirt 洗掉污垢
example_sentence: There is some dirt on his clothes.
example_translation: 他的衣服上有一些泥土。

phrases: mountain track 山间小路；railway track 铁轨
example_sentence: They walked along a narrow track in the forest.
example_translation: 他们沿着森林里的窄路行走。

phrases: link A to B 把A和B连接起来
example_sentence: The bridge links the village to the city.
example_translation: 这座桥把村庄和城市连接起来。

phrases: wide road 宽阔的道路；wide use 广泛使用
example_sentence: The new highway is very wide.
Ships come and go at the port every day.
